root_cause: The real N2 JANGTQ2 bundle intentionally has metadata-only MTP with no mtp.* tensors: jang_config.mtp.enabled=false, jang_config.mtp.kept=false, runtime.bundle_has_mtp=false, and runtime.mtp_mode=metadata_only_missing_weights. The Python native-MTP inspector only treated runtime modes containing 'drop' as intentionally dropped, so this valid dropped-MTP sidecar shape was incorrectly reported as metadata_inconsistent.
source_fix: vmlx_engine/native_mtp.py now treats jang_config.mtp.enabled=false, jang_config.mtp.kept=false, runtime.bundle_has_mtp=false with metadata_only/missing_weight modes as explicit dropped-MTP metadata.
vmlx_engine/server.py fallback status path uses the same dropped-MTP sidecar classification.
tests/test_native_mtp_autodetect.py adds a qwen3_5_moe JANGTQ2 metadata_only_missing_weights regression.
verification: .venv/bin/python -m pytest -q tests/test_native_mtp_autodetect.py tests/test_mtp_telemetry_edge_cases.py tests/test_engine_audit.py -k 'runtime_metadata_can_explicitly_drop_configured_mtp or jang_mtp_sidecar_can_explicitly_drop_configured_metadata_only_mtp or drop_mtp_true_strict_bool_still_works or drop_mtp_false_strict_bool_still_works or mtp_status_reports_dropped_dsv4_artifact'
not_proven: No new model generation run was launched for this proof.
This does not make N2 JANGTQ2 native MTP active; it honestly reports that this artifact dropped MTP weights.
This does not clear N2 JANG_1L.
This does not clear audio support; current N2 JANGTQ2 audio proof remains failed/unsupported unless separately fixed or proven.
This does not enter package, sign, notarize, PyPI, updater, download, or public release work.
